title: rosa canina var. rufescens
intro: Rosa canina var. rufescens, also known as the red dog rose or ruddy dog rose, is a variant of the Rosa canina plant, a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. rufescens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and reducing the severity of colds and flu. Rosa canina var. rufescens can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in skincare products due to its astringent and antiseptic properties.
